productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Red Adipure Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteBarefoot runners who love adidas - the brand comes up with a great shoe just for you! The adiPure Trainer is great for weight lifting, plyometric and gym enthusiasts as well. Product DetailsFabric upper with molded design for each of the toeThree stripes on the upper offers great support over the foot bridge Has a padded inner with EVA midsoles with foam cellsTPU textured outsole with flex grooves and cross-shaped holes at the midfoot region of the outsoleMaterial and CareStretch fabricWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
